title: Marketplace Overview tab is visible for BP-enabled users
objective: Verify BP-enabled users can see the Marketplaces Overview tab under Brand Protector > Benefits.
preconditions: User account has Brand Protection feature enabled and can access Benefits page.

steps.step: Log in and navigate to Brand Protector > Benefits.
steps.expected_result: Benefits page loads successfully.

steps.step: Inspect the top navigation tabs.
steps.expected_result: Marketplaces Overview tab is visible alongside existing tabs.

expected_result: BP-enabled users can access the Marketplaces Overview tab.

title: Marketplace Overview tab opens with default filters and Card view
objective: Verify default page state after clicking Marketplaces Overview tab.
preconditions: User is BP-enabled and on Brand Protector > Benefits.

steps.step: Click the Marketplaces Overview tab.
steps.expected_result: Marketplace Overview page opens.

steps.step: Check default filter and view state.
steps.expected_result: All brands, all regions, last week calendar, and Card view are selected by default.

expected_result: Dashboard opens in expected default state.

title: Marketplace Overview tab is hidden for users without BP feature
objective: Validate access control for non-BP users.
preconditions: User account does not have Brand Protection feature entitlement.

steps.step: Log in and navigate to Brand Protector area.
steps.expected_result: Navigation loads for available features.

steps.step: Open Benefits and inspect top navigation tabs.
steps.expected_result: Marketplaces Overview tab is not displayed.

expected_result: Non-BP users cannot see or access Marketplace Overview.

title: Brand filter lists all brands linked to the account
objective: Verify account-scoped brand list in Brand filter.
preconditions: User is on Marketplace Overview and account has multiple brands configured.

steps.step: Open Brand filter dropdown.
steps.expected_result: Dropdown opens and displays selectable brand list.

steps.step: Compare displayed brands with account brand master list.
steps.expected_result: All account-linked brands are listed with no unrelated brands.

expected_result: Brand filter options are accurate and account-specific.

title: Region filter shows only regions enabled for the account
objective: Verify region filter is limited to enabled regions.
preconditions: User is on Marketplace Overview and account has a known region entitlement set.

steps.step: Open Region filter dropdown.
steps.expected_result: Region dropdown opens.

steps.step: Validate listed regions against enabled account regions.
steps.expected_result: Only enabled regions (for example US, UK, DE) are displayed.

expected_result: Region filter prevents selection of unauthorized regions.

title: Calendar defaults to last week and View toggle defaults to Card
objective: Validate initial filter and layout defaults on page load.
preconditions: User navigates to Marketplace Overview.

steps.step: Load Marketplace Overview page.
steps.expected_result: Page and filter bar render.

steps.step: Inspect calendar and view toggle defaults.
steps.expected_result: Calendar is set to last full week and view is Card.

expected_result: Default calendar and layout match PRD behavior.

title: Switching Card to Table view retains active filter selections
objective: Verify selected Brand/Region/Date context persists during view switch.
preconditions: User has selected non-default brand, region, and date on Card view.

steps.step: Set Brand, Region, and Calendar to custom values on Card view.
steps.expected_result: Cards refresh based on selected filters.

steps.step: Toggle View by setting from Card to Table.
steps.expected_result: Table view renders with same filter selections preserved.

expected_result: User context is retained across view formats.

title: Combined Brand and Region filters scope KPI data intersection
objective: Validate KPI aggregation respects intersection of selected brand and region filters.
preconditions: User has access to multiple brands and regions with known KPI differences.

steps.step: Select Brand A and Region US, capture key KPI values.
steps.expected_result: Dashboard shows KPIs for Brand A in US only.

steps.step: Change to Brand B and same region, then compare values.
steps.expected_result: KPI values update to reflect Brand B and differ as expected by data set.

expected_result: KPI data changes based on filter intersection, not global totals.

title: No-result filter combination shows stable empty state
objective: Ensure dashboard handles filter combinations with no data.
preconditions: A brand-region-week combination exists with no KPI records.

steps.step: Select a known no-data brand-region-week combination.
steps.expected_result: Dashboard refreshes without runtime errors.

steps.step: Inspect cards/table placeholders and labels.
steps.expected_result: UI shows consistent empty/zero state messaging instead of blank or broken widgets.

expected_result: No-data scenarios are handled gracefully.

title: Amazon activated card shows required KPI sections and counts
objective: Validate Amazon card structure and KPI groups for activated marketplace.
preconditions: Amazon marketplace is activated for selected brand/region.

steps.step: Open Marketplace Overview in Card view with Amazon activated.
steps.expected_result: Amazon card is visible with Activated badge.

steps.step: Verify KPI grouping and counts on Amazon card.
steps.expected_result: Analytics (4), Brand Violation (2), and Enforcement Centre (4) sections are present.

expected_result: Amazon activated card fully matches KPI definition in PRD.

title: Walmart activated card excludes Brand Violation section
objective: Verify Walmart card follows marketplace-specific KPI applicability rules.
preconditions: Walmart marketplace is activated for selected brand/region.

steps.step: Open Card view where Walmart is activated.
steps.expected_result: Walmart card is visible with Activated badge.

steps.step: Inspect KPI sections on Walmart card.
steps.expected_result: Only Analytics (4) and Enforcement Centre (4) are present; Brand Violation section is not shown.

expected_result: Walmart card does not display unsupported Brand Violation KPIs.

title: Non-activated marketplaces show Initiate Trial and summary KPIs
objective: Validate trial-state card rendering for eBay/Target.
preconditions: eBay and/or Target are not activated for selected account context.

steps.step: Open Card view with non-activated marketplace present.
steps.expected_result: Non-activated marketplace card renders.

steps.step: Inspect status and KPI fields.
steps.expected_result: Initiate Trial button and summary KPIs (No. of Listings, No. of Resellers, WoW) are shown.

expected_result: Trial-state marketplaces follow reduced KPI design.

title: Marketplace status changes from trial to activated after activation
objective: Verify card state transition when marketplace activation status changes.
preconditions: A marketplace is initially non-activated and then activated for same account.

steps.step: Load Card view while marketplace is non-activated.
steps.expected_result: Card shows Initiate Trial state.

steps.step: Activate the marketplace and reload page.
steps.expected_result: Card switches to Activated badge and full KPI section layout.

expected_result: Activation state transitions correctly on next load.

title: Zero KPI values are displayed as 0 in Card view
objective: Ensure KPI rendering preserves explicit zero values.
preconditions: Selected marketplace-week has KPI values equal to zero.

steps.step: Open Card view for known zero-value dataset.
steps.expected_result: Marketplace card displays KPI fields.

steps.step: Inspect KPI values across sections.
steps.expected_result: Zero values render as 0 and are not blank, null, or hidden.

expected_result: Users can distinguish zero performance from missing data.

title: Table view renders one row per marketplace with KPI parity
objective: Verify Table view shows all marketplaces and KPI columns aligned with Card view.
preconditions: User is on Marketplace Overview with accessible marketplace data.

steps.step: Toggle to Table view.
steps.expected_result: Marketplace table is displayed.

steps.step: Check table rows and KPI columns against Card view definitions.
steps.expected_result: One row per marketplace is present and KPI columns match Card view data model.

expected_result: Table format provides complete parity with Card data.

title: Walmart Brand Violation columns display '--' in Table view
objective: Validate non-applicable KPI display rule in table.
preconditions: Walmart row is present in Table view.

steps.step: Open Table view and locate Walmart row.
steps.expected_result: Walmart row is visible.

steps.step: Inspect Total Brand Violation and Violations Closed columns.
steps.expected_result: Both columns show '--' instead of 0 or blank.

expected_result: Non-applicable KPI columns follow placeholder convention.

title: Non-activated marketplace row shows Initiate Trial in status column
objective: Verify status/action rendering in table for trial marketplaces.
preconditions: At least one marketplace (for example eBay) is non-activated.

steps.step: Open Table view and locate non-activated marketplace row.
steps.expected_result: Row is visible in table.

steps.step: Inspect Status column value.
steps.expected_result: Initiate Trial action/button is displayed for that row.

expected_result: Table status behavior matches Card trial-state behavior.

title: Table default sort and pagination controls are available
objective: Validate MVP table sorting and pagination behavior.
preconditions: User is in Table view.

steps.step: Open Table view and inspect row order.
steps.expected_result: Rows are sorted by marketplace name alphabetically by default.

steps.step: Inspect footer controls.
steps.expected_result: Rows-per-page and pagination controls are visible (default 10 rows/page).

expected_result: Table scalability controls render as specified.

title: Initiate Trial sends support email with required subject and body
objective: Verify email trigger content for non-activated marketplace trial request.
preconditions: Non-activated marketplace is visible and support email integration (or mailto) is configured.

steps.step: Click Initiate Trial on a non-activated marketplace for selected Brand X.
steps.expected_result: Email trigger action is initiated.

steps.step: Inspect generated email payload/content.
steps.expected_result: Subject is 'Initiate L1 report for Brand X' and body includes 'Hey Team, can you run L1 audit for Brand X on eBay'.

expected_result: Support email request is generated with exact content pattern.

title: Trial request success confirmation is displayed to user
objective: Ensure successful trial request provides visible user feedback.
preconditions: Initiate Trial action succeeds.

steps.step: Click Initiate Trial for a non-activated marketplace.
steps.expected_result: Request submission starts.

steps.step: Observe post-action message and button state.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation 'Trial request sent successfully' appears; button may change to Requested/disabled.

expected_result: User receives clear success feedback and duplicate intent is discouraged.

title: Multi-brand selection requires explicit brand choice before trial email
objective: Validate ambiguity handling when multiple brands are selected.
preconditions: User selects multiple brands in Brand filter and non-activated marketplace is available.

steps.step: With multiple brands selected, click Initiate Trial.
steps.expected_result: System evaluates brand context.

steps.step: Inspect prompt behavior.
steps.expected_result: User is prompted to choose a specific brand before sending the request.

expected_result: System avoids sending ambiguous trial requests.

title: Calendar defaults to last complete Monday-Sunday week
objective: Verify exact week-bounding logic for default calendar.
preconditions: System date is known and weekly boundaries can be validated.

steps.step: Load Marketplace Overview on a weekday (example Thursday).
steps.expected_result: Calendar is auto-populated.

steps.step: Compare selected range to expected last complete Monday-Sunday week.
steps.expected_result: Default range equals previous full week, not current partial week.

expected_result: Calendar consistently opens on most recent complete week.

title: Weekly data refresh updates dashboard KPIs for latest complete week
objective: Validate successful aggregation job output is reflected in Marketplace Overview.
preconditions: Weekly refresh job is runnable and source module data exists for last complete week.

steps.step: Execute or wait for weekly refresh job completion.
steps.expected_result: Aggregation job reports success.

steps.step: Load Marketplace Overview and verify key KPIs against refreshed source snapshots.
steps.expected_result: Dashboard values match the latest complete week's aggregated values.

expected_result: Dashboard reflects updated weekly data after successful refresh.

title: Failed or delayed weekly refresh shows stale data indicator
objective: Ensure stale-data fallback behavior is visible when aggregation is unavailable.
preconditions: Simulate weekly job failure or source pipeline delay.

steps.step: Force or simulate aggregation job failure/delay state.
steps.expected_result: Latest data generation is unavailable.

steps.step: Load Marketplace Overview and inspect data status messaging.
steps.expected_result: Last available week data is shown along with stale data indicator containing date range.

expected_result: System degrades gracefully when refresh cannot complete.
